repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md Section 3 ExactID catalogue empty; closest failed eid_proximal_did_bridge_frontier_v1 is not an in-catalogue theorem

published_prior_art.cite: MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024 DOI https://doi.org/10.1080/24754269.2024.2390748 gives double-negative-control bridge equations; SoferRichardsonColicinoSchwartzTchetgen2016 DOI 10.1214/16-STS558 gives NOC interpretation of DiD
The identity tau_br - tau_did = kappa is an algebraic restatement of the proposal definitions, not a new published-method frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md Section 1 panel entries are Q1 projection/FWL families, not negative-control bridge-regime classifiers

published_prior_art.cite: RambachanRoth2023 DOI https://doi.org/10.1093/restud/rdad018 covers pretrend sensitivity; MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024 covers bridge use of negative-control exposure

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship counterexample targets NCO/pretrend diagnostics, but no quoted published claim says an S_W-only diagnostic should recover or classify a double-proxy bridge regime; MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024 already makes the exposure proxy load-bearing.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The non-classification result refutes diagnostics that discard Z, but the proposal does not name a specific published estimator or workflow claiming Z can be discarded for proximal bridge identification; tier=letter/field below novelty_target=flagship.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The open-neighborhood claim is largely imported by Assumption 5, which already assumes equality-fiber perturbations preserving S_W and strict kappa inequalities; after that substitution the proof route has fewer than three substantive steps.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the target with a quoted claim from a specific NC-DiD or pretrend-diagnostic workflow that actually discards Z, then state the theorem as a strict non-representability result against that workflow.
Remove Assumption 5 or weaken it to primitive positivity/determinant margins, then prove the equality-fiber perturbation as a substantive lemma with an explicit parameterization.
If flagship remains the target, promote the finite witness into a generic-class obstruction with a named published comparator chain and a nontrivial observable frontier, not just the two-law example.

recommended_next_step: Do not send this kernel to Stage 0; either pivot or re-anchor it to a specific published diagnostic claim and prove the generic obstruction rather than the current finite witness.
